---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Tailwind v4 Migrator
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
-------------

## Feature Description

Provide a clear description of the feature you would like to see added.

Example:
Add support for detecting Tailwind classes inside `clsx()` calls.

---

## Problem This Feature Solves

Explain the problem this feature would solve.

Example:
Many React projects use `clsx()` or `classnames()` to manage conditional Tailwind classes.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see implemented.

Example:
Extend the AST transformer to detect Tailwind classes inside `clsx()` function calls.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references that could help with this feature.
